title: Coding Agent VMs on NixOS with microvm.nix
author: Michael Stapelberg
excerpt:
Table of contents
I have come to appreciate coding agents to be valuable tools for working with computer program code in any capacity, such as learning about any program’s architecture, diagnosing bugs or developing proofs of concept. Depending on the use-case, reviewing each command the agent wants to run can get tedious and time-consuming very quickly.
